cpus.description: CPUs to be used. Workers should have these many CPUs available.

gpus.description: GPUs to be used. Workers should have these many GPUs available.

memory.description: RAM memory to be used. Workers should have these much RAM available.

cudaGpuMemPercentage.description: Maximum memory fraction allowed to be used from the GPU vRAM.

modelId.description: Model ID. hexagrad/Kokoro-82M for TTS and one of the following for STT: tiny.en, tiny, base.en, base, small.en, small, medium.en, medium, large-v1, large-v2, large-v3, large, distil-large-v2, distil-medium.en, distil-small.en, distil-large-v3, large-v3-turbo, turbo

mode.description: Mode of the model: audio_speech for TTS, audio_transcription for STT

nodeport.description: Specify the node port for the service that exposes the job

litellmBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the LiteLLM service (central model registry). This can be an external LiteLLM instance or an internal deployment in the pool (default)

litellmKey.description: Master key of the LiteLLM service (central model registry)

litellmAccessGroup.description: What access group to assign the model to (ringfencing)

litellmKalavaiExtras.description: Extra information to store in the LiteLLM model registration (must be a dictionary)

lagoUrl.description: Base URL of the Lago service (payment system)

lagoApiKey.description: Master key of the Lago service

lagoExternalSubscriptionId.description: ID of the Lago subscription to send events to

lagoEventCode.description: Event code to use when submitting event to Lago payment API

lagoEventInterval.description: Interval in seconds to send the lago event

priorityClassName.description: PriorityClassName to use for the deployment

nodeSelectors.description: target specific devices. Expected format -> key: value pairs, where 'value' is a list of elements

nodeSelectorsOps.description: Logical operation to use to apply to nodeSelectors. Accepted values: 'OR', 'AND'
